scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply LINGRY_DB --local --persist-to "%TEMP%\lingry-wrangler-state"
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply LINGRY_DB --remote
scripts.db:schema:local: npx wrangler d1 execute LINGRY_DB --local --persist-to "%TEMP%\lingry-wrangler-state" --command "SELECT name, type FROM sqlite_master WHERE type IN ('table','index') ORDER BY type, name"
scripts.db:schema:remote: npx wrangler d1 execute LINGRY_DB --remote --command "SELECT name, type FROM sqlite_master WHERE type IN ('table','index') ORDER BY type, name"
